character.name: swine
character.prompt: Anthropomorphic bipedal pig, pink skin, prominent snout and ears, slim well-groomed, well-fitted dark charcoal travel suit, white shirt, oxblood silk cravat (not a tie), no glasses, confident upright posture, middle-aged Polish law firm partner. Polish komiks illustration, clean ink-line outlines, flat warm earth-tone colors, PRL-era mood, pixel-art, full body, hands at sides. Palette: #1a1410, #f0c8c0, #1c2a40, #e8e4d8, #7a1f2a, #0d0a08
